title: millotia greevesii subsp. kempei
intro: Millotia greevesii subsp. kempei, also known as Kempei Millotia, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant native to India. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be beneficial in reducing inflammation and protecting the body against free radicals. The health benefits of Millotia greevesii subsp. kempei include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Millotia greevesii subsp. kempei can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
